name: Tiramisu (4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg yolks and sugar in the top of a double boiler. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until thick and lemon colored.
2. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring constantly for 8-10 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Add mascarpone and beat until smooth.
4. In a medium bowl, beat whipping cream until soft peaks form. Fold into cheese mixture.
5. Combine water, coffee granules, and brandy in a small dish. Brush onto cut sides of ladyfingers.
6. Line the bottom and sides of a trifle bowl or 3-quart souffle dish with half of the ladyfingers. Pour in half of the filling.
7. Layer remaining ladyfingers on top. Garnish if desired, cover, and chill for 8 hours.
8. Yield: 10-12 servings
